name: qencode
description: Qencode marketplace — agentic skills for the Qencode Transcoding API.

plugins.name: qencode-skills
plugins.description: Build, submit, monitor, and troubleshoot Qencode transcoding jobs from inside Claude Code. Covers HLS/DASH ABR ladders, MP4 ladders, audio outputs, thumbnails, subtitles, speech-to-text, DRM (Widevine/PlayReady/Fairplay/EZDRM/BuyDRM/ExpressPlay), per-title encoding, callbacks, stitching, and per-provider storage destinations. Bundles the qencode MCP server (OAuth-protected) for live submission.
